prompt: Minimalist Oriental aesthetics × commercial illustration style, theme 'Wonders of the Brush', vertical composition, S-shaped flowing visual dynamic, simple yet design-focused screen. The background is light beige rice paper texture with soft gradients. A brush serves as the starting point, the strokes extending into flowing colored ink, which gradually transforms into blooming flowers in the air; flowers are elegant and moderately realistic. Harmonious and rich color system: green-blue + pink + light orange + gold leaf accents, soft and transparent colors without over-saturation. Subtle particle light effects and a sense of flow are added, with fine gold lines outlining details. Overall style: high-end commercial illustration, blending Oriental mood with modern design. Clean screen with a sense of breathing, clear visual center, suitable for posters or brand KV. High-precision details, soft lighting, delicate texture, elegant style, cinematic visual quality, trendy style, digital art texture, modern graphic design elements.
